reforms.description: Public funding of industrial research and development has increased substantially, supporting innovation in the manufacturing sector.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increased public funding for R&D enhances the capacity for innovation in manufacturing, potentially leading to higher productivity and competitiveness.
reforms.status_evidence: Public funding of industrial research and development has also increased substantially.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in public investment towards R&D, which is crucial for enhancing the innovation capacity of the manufacturing sector.
reforms.source_quote: Public funding of industrial research and development has also increased substantially.
